name: sidebar-menu-badge
visual_summary: The sidebar menu badge is a visually distinguishable indicator on a sidebar menu item. It is used to highlight important notifications or unread counts to draw the user's attention. The badge is commonly used in the application's main navigation to provide a quick glance at the user's activity.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready badge component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-menu-badge
Description: The sidebar menu badge is a visually distinguishable indicator on a sidebar menu item. It is used to highlight important notifications or unread counts to draw the user's attention. The badge is commonly used in the application's main navigation to provide a quick glance at the user's activity.
Style: e.g. rounded, pill-shaped
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable
Tags: sidebar, menu, badge, notification, unread, indicator

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
